name: PDF Viewer
description: A lightweight PDF viewer with horizontal scrolling, ideal for musicians reading sheet music.

name: PDF Cropper
description: An advanced PDF cropping tool that can split pages mid-page, separate into multiple documents, and merge pages together.

name: MusicXML to Scorify
description: Convert MusicXML, XML, or MXL files into Typst Scorify code, with an in-browser preview of the generated score.

name: SQLite Viewer
description: A simple SQLite viewer and playground. Upload a database to browse its contents and run queries interactively.

name: Slideshow Generator
description: Create slideshows from uploaded images with custom text, transitions, and music. Exports directly to MP4.

name: Cardify
description: Batch-print cards on a sheet of paper. Automatically fits the maximum number of cards per page, with support for double-sided printing.

name: Investment Calculator
description: A simple investment calculator for projecting net worth over time and determining the required contributions to reach a target.

name: Spotweld Plotter
description: Upload a .stp or CAD file to plot spotwelds on a 3D model. Automatically traces paths between spots and exports location data to JSON.
